title: Cabinet approves relief scheme
description: The cabinet has approved the "Thais Help Thais Plus" programme together with additional support measures for vulnerable groups, with a combined budget of 176 billion baht, Finance Minister Ekniti Nitithanprapas announced on Tuesday.

title: Eckert reportedly fearing for job after accepting responsibility over spying
description: Southampton FC head coach Tonda Eckert is reportedly fearing for his job after accepting responsibility for spying on opposition teams this season.
